summary: The required zip exists, was extracted into an isolated connector workspace, and passed integrity/manifest/task-table checks. It is not buildable because it contains no connector implementation source or build manifest.

checks.name: zip_integrity
checks.evidence: unzip -t reported all 7 archive members OK and no compressed-data errors.

checks.name: manifest_hashes
checks.evidence: Manifest-declared hashes for 6 files matched extracted file hashes.

checks.name: task_table
checks.evidence: CSV parsed as 83 rows with zero duplicate task IDs; first CLC-001, last CLC-116.

checks.name: build_manifest_discovery
checks.evidence: No Cargo.toml, package.json, bun lock, Makefile, Justfile, pyproject.toml, go.mod, deno.json, or tsconfig.json found under extracted package.

checks.name: connection_smoke
checks.evidence: No MCP gateway server implementation or /mcp endpoint exists in the archive.

adjacent_evidence_not_completion.note: Root corrected that this runner/frontdoor proof is adjacent evidence only and must not be treated as CONN-001 complete.

next_required_action: Supply or create the actual implementation repo at /home/flexnetos/FlexNetOS/src/chatgpt-local-codex-connector, then build/test that source with cargo build --workspace and cargo test --workspace.
